D.state_signal: The state is moving toward direction, control, pressure management, and visible action.
D.resistance_pattern: When overloaded, this pattern may force movement before trust, pacing, or relational clarity has caught up.
D.immediate_step: Choose one pressure point and reduce it into one clean decision, one boundary, or one next action.
D.regulation_story: The healthy D story is not about overpowering the room. It is about carrying direction without becoming trapped inside control.
D.healthy_read: Read the Healthy regulation story first. Look for where the character keeps direction while restoring timing, trust, and connection.

I.state_signal: The state is moving toward expression, connection, visibility, and emotional motion.
I.resistance_pattern: When overloaded, this pattern may perform movement before the real feeling has been named.
I.immediate_step: Say the real thing once, then give the energy a clear container so it can become useful.
I.regulation_story: The healthy I story is not about being louder. It is about letting expression become honest enough to land.
I.healthy_read: Read the Healthy regulation story first. Look for where the character keeps the spark while restoring grounding, truth, and follow-through.

S.state_signal: The state is moving toward steadiness, care, rhythm, safety, and relational continuity.
S.resistance_pattern: When overloaded, this pattern may preserve peace while delaying honesty, need, or self-inclusion.
S.immediate_step: Name one need before adjusting yourself around everyone else's needs.
S.regulation_story: The healthy S story is not about keeping everything calm. It is about protecting rhythm without disappearing inside the support role.
S.healthy_read: Read the Healthy regulation story first. Look for where the character keeps care while restoring boundary, voice, and self-presence.

C.state_signal: The state is moving toward clarity, structure, precision, preparation, and internal control.
C.resistance_pattern: When overloaded, this pattern may keep refining the structure long after the next move is already visible.
C.immediate_step: Create the smallest useful structure, then act before refinement becomes another delay.
C.regulation_story: The healthy C story is not about perfect certainty. It is about letting clarity serve movement instead of replacing it.
C.healthy_read: Read the Healthy regulation story first. Look for where the character keeps precision while restoring trust, motion, and human connection.
